summary: 5-Item Unresolved Fixes Pack - All features verified and working. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified via Playwright. Fixed a bug in customer_notifications_routes.py where activity feed sorting failed due to datetime/string comparison.
updated_files: /app/backend/customer_notifications_routes.py - Fixed activity feed sorting to handle datetime/string comparison
context_for_next_testing_agent: 5-Item Unresolved Fixes Pack fully tested and verified. All features working: 1) Customer-safe timeline mapping (Ordered, Confirmed, In Progress, Quality Check, Ready, Completed for Product; Requested, Scheduled, In Progress, Review, Completed for Service; Submitted, Processing, Active, Completed for Promo). Customer NEVER sees vendor-internal labels. 2) Invoice payer_name returned by all invoice APIs. 3) Auto-assignment at approval creates vendor_orders with status 'assigned', sales_assignment with actual sales user, and notifications for customer/vendor/sales. 4) Real stored notifications in bell icon + dashboard card for all roles. 5) Route cleanup: /dashboard-legacy/* redirects to /dashboard, /partner/fulfillment redirects to /partner/orders.

customer_timeline_mapping.details: GET /api/customer/orders returns customer_status, timeline_steps, timeline_index fields. Customer drawer shows customer-safe labels (Ordered, Confirmed, In Progress, Quality Check, Ready, Completed). No vendor-internal labels visible.

customer_orders_no_vendor_identity.details: Customer orders API does not expose vendor_ids or vendor fields. Customer drawer does not show vendor name/identity.

invoice_payer_name.details: GET /api/customer/invoices returns payer_name and payment_status_label fields. Customer invoice table shows PAYER NAME column.

notifications_api.details: GET /api/notifications returns notifications with is_read field for all roles (customer, admin, partner). Unread count API works correctly.

notification_bell_ui.details: Notification bell shows unread count (24) and notification list. Dashboard shows notifications card with '5 new'. Mark all read functionality available.

admin_orders_tabs.details: Admin orders page has tabs: All Orders, New, Assigned, In Progress, Completed. NO 'Awaiting Release' tab.

admin_order_drawer_7_sections.details: Admin order drawer has 7 sections: Order Summary, Customer, Assignment, Payment, Fulfillment, Timeline, Admin Actions.

sign_out_in_profile_dropdown.details: Sign Out button is in top-right profile dropdown for Customer, Admin, and Partner layouts. NOT in sidebar bottom.

vendor_orders_privacy.details: Vendor orders table does NOT show customer name. Shows: Date, Vendor Order No, Source Type, Base Price, Status, Priority.

bug_fix_applied.issue: Activity feed sorting failed with TypeError: '<' not supported between instances of 'datetime.datetime' and 'str'
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added get_sort_key function to normalize datetime objects to ISO strings before sorting
